zh.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying於1480年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆。她於1494年與William Ravens在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1536年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Starlying
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stallings
meanings: English: prrobably an altered form of   Starling  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Nicholas Stallings from England, who settled in VA in the 17th century.

variants.name: Sterling
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Starling, Sterling (Old English Stærling), itself from the bird-name, whose use as a nickname may also be another source of the surname. Compare Stare 2.
German: from Middle High German sterlinc, the name of a coin, hence probably a nickname for someone who paid that amount in rent.

nameMeanings.name: JoHanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: E.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 鄂, a short form of present-day Hubei province: (i) from E (鄂), the name of an ancient state (located in Henan province), destroyed by the king Zhou, last king of the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) from the placename E (鄂), the name of a fief (located in Shanxi province) in the state of Jin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the placename E (鄂), the name of a fief (located in Hubei province) granted to the royal members of the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) possibly a surname from minority ethnic groups in southwestern China. (v) said to be adopted as a new surname by Yue Ting, who changed his original name Yue (嶽) to E (鄂), because he fled to Huangmei in present-day Hubei province (called E (鄂) at that time) to avoid persecution after his father Yue Fei (1103–1142  AD ), a famous Chinese general in the Southern Song dynasty (1127 – 1279  AD ), was put to death by the then emperor.

en.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying was born in 1480, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She married William Ravens in 1494, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1536, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying est née en 1480, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William Ravens en 1494, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1536, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying wurde 1480 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1494 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom William Ravens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1536 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying è nata il nel 1480 nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William Ravens nel 1494, nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1536, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying(은)는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 William Ravens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying nasceu em 1480, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com William Ravens em 1494, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1536, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying родилась в 1480 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ravens в 1494 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1536 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: JoHanna E. Starlying nació en 1480, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William Ravens en 1494, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1536, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
